documentation: This Intel® oneAPI Runtime COMMON LIBRARIES package contains shared common libraries needed to deploy executables to hosts without the Intel® oneAPI development Toolkits. This COMMON Libraries package should be downloaded and installed along with the COMMON LICENSING package and one or more of the Compiler-Specific runtimes.
